song.title: Sunshine In My Soul
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) There is sunshine in my soul today, More glorious and bright Than glows in any earthly sky, For Jesus is my light.
[C] Chorus O there’s sunshine, blessed sunshine, While the peaceful, happy moments roll; When Jesus shows His smiling face There is sunshine in my soul.
[V2] 2) There is music in my soul today, A carol to my King; And Jesus, listening, can hear The song I cannot sing.
[V3] 3) There is springtime In my soul today, For when the Lord is near, The dove of peace sings in my heart, The flow’rs of grace appear.
[V4] 4) There is gladness in my soul today, And hope, and praise, and love, For blessings which He gives me now, For joys “laid up” above.
song.author: Eliza Edmunds Hewitt
